title: Implement BulletManager core (per-dimension, chunk bucketing, ID counter, basic API)

reference_files.reason: BulletManager - per-dimension (Level/ServerLevel), not Minecraft entity, chunk bucketing index, int ID counter from 1 monotonic no reuse, near INT_MAX wraparound + WARN
BulletManager API - get(level), getAllBullets, getBulletById, fireBullet; BulletRecord interface
API overview - BulletManager.get(level), getClientLevel(level), fireBullet, getAllBullets, getBulletById

acceptance_criteria: BulletManager class created, one instance per Level/ServerLevel (stored via WeakHashMap<Level, BulletManager> or Level capability/attachment)
BulletManager.get(Level level) static method returns the per-dimension manager instance
Internal bullet storage: Collection<BulletRecord> for active bullets + Map<ChunkPos, Collection<BulletRecord>> for chunk bucketing index
int ID counter starts at 1, monotonically increments, never reuses IDs of dead bullets
When counter approaches Integer.MAX_VALUE, logs WARN and wraps to 1
addBullet(BulletRecord) method adds bullet to active list + registers in chunk bucket
removeBullet(int bulletId, RemoveReason) method removes bullet from active list + chunk bucket (hook triggering handled in subtask 14)
getAllBullets() returns Collection<BulletRecord> of all active bullets
Chunk bucket migration: when bullet crosses chunk boundary, framework moves it from old bucket to new bucket (updateChunkBucket method)
getBulletsInChunkRange(ChunkPos center, int radius) helper for 3x3 neighborhood query (used by collision detection)
